name: Stealthed
description: Harder to notice. Breaks on aggressive action.

name: Bleeding
description: Loses health each combat round until treated.

name: Irradiated
description: Toxic energy exposure raises long-term damage risk.

name: Steadfast
description: Harder to down through pain or fear.

name: Shaken
description: Confidence rattled by fear or psychic pressure.

name: Scarred Survivor
description: You are harder to break after near-death experiences.

name: Clean Killer
description: Violence comes easy, and your face barely changes when it happens.

name: Saint of Nowhere
description: People trust you more than they should.

name: Void-Touched
description: Anomalies recognize something in you, and that is not comforting.
